page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 16 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 16 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations indicate a clear distinction between single-threaded and multi-threaded performance. Single-core execution is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores falling into the bottom 25 percent, and single-threaded gzip compression ranking in the bottom 10 percent. However, the instance leverages its 16 dedicated cores to achieve average multi-core performance across several tests, including Geekbench multi-core, Passmark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory bandwidth remains in the average range for both cached small-block reads and uncached large-block read and write operations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation provides predictable compute resources without the performance degradation associated with shared-core environments, though the older processor architecture limits single-thread efficiency. The instance demonstrates average throughput for database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving. It is also capable of handling moderate LLM inference tasks for smaller models. This resource profile is suitable for multi-threaded workloads such as software compilation, image processing, static web serving, and general-purpose database hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and lacks local storage or GPU accelerators. Network performance is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Benchmark data reveals weak single-core performance, but average multi-core capabilities, as demonstrated in Geekbench and Passmark testing. Memory bandwidth and database operations also perform within average ranges. This instance is suitable for multi-threaded workloads, including software compilation, static web serving, and general-purpose database hosting where dedicated compute resources are required.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, offering average multi-core performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps bandwidth, suitable for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core compute instance offering balanced memory-to-CPU allocation for standard multi-threaded workloads and general-purpose applications.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth without local storage
